name: Credit Solutions Services
description_short: Credit Solutions Services is a credit repair provider based in Sterling Heights, Michigan. Rated 5.0/5 with 53 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Solutions Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in Sterling Heights, Michigan. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 53 reviews, Credit Solutions Services has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Sterling Heights area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit reporting agency, financial consultant, Credit Solutions Services provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in Sterling Heights, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Solutions Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Sterling Heights, Michigan area who are considering Credit Solutions Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
